title: Estonia says Nato jet shot down drone over its territory
summary_full: Estonia suspects the drone was a Ukrainian projectile knocked off course by Russian electronic jamming.
summary_public: Estonia suspects the drone was a Ukrainian projectile knocked off course by Russian electronic jamming.
